quick-enable.name: Enabled
quick-enable.description: Enable/Disable the mod without needing to restart the game

volume.name: Volume
volume.description:
The volume for the reaction

<cr>The reactions are very loud, so be careful!</c>

reaction.name: Reaction
reaction.description:
Select whether you want a specific reaction or a random one.

You can also choose whether you want to use a <cc>custom reaction</c>

custom-reaction.name: Custom Reaction
custom-reaction.description: A path to an <cc>audio file</c> that will be treated as a <co>custom reaction</c>

swearuk.name: SwearUK
swearuk.description:
Show the uncensored version of all the reactions

<co>(Contains profanity, may not be appropriate for all ages)</c>

no-normal.name: No Reaction On Normal Mode
no-normal.description: Do not play any reaction when playing on normal mode

no-platformer.name: No Reaction on Platformer Mode
no-platformer.description: Do not play any reaction while on platformer

no-practice.name: No Reaction On Practice
no-practice.description: Do not play any reaction when playing on practice mode

no-startpos.name: No Reaction On Startpos
no-startpos.description: Do not play any reaction when playing on a start position

preload-sounds.name: Preload Sounds
preload-sounds.description:
Try to preload all sounds when opening a level.

Disabling this may reduce performance. Enabling this may increase memory usage and level load times
